feed.title: Scholar Alerts — Clean Feed
feed.subtitle: Google Scholar alerts reformatted as individual article entries

entry.title: Polluted White Dwarfs: Insights into Ancient Extrasolar Planetary Systems John Henry David Harrison Institute of Astronomy
entry.content:
Authors: JHD Harrison

Abstract: ... If this were the case, complex life may be present on our nearest neighbours ... entered the space age, the speculation of complex life inhabiting the surface of Venus ... of a rocky world and the composition of its layers are: the composition of the stellar ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Astrobiology, Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets

Alert: (~biosignature|life|alien|organic) (Mars|Venus ... (keyword alert)

entry.title: Ammonia as a parameter shaping habitability on icy moons
entry.content:
Authors: CM Hopton, CS Cockell - FEMS Microbes, 2026

Abstract: ... The search for life now extends beyond the traditional habitable zone to include the 30 icy moons of Jupiter and Saturn. These moons ... Ammonia could therefore influence the habitability of extraterrestrial 35 oceans, yet this topic has received ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Astrobiology, Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets

Alert: (habitable|habitability planet|planetary|world ... (keyword alert)

entry.title: Ammonia as a parameter shaping habitability on icy moons

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: CM Hopton, CS Cockell - FEMS Microbes, 2026

Abstract: ... We examine the role of ammonia in prebiotic 40 chemistry, biochemistry, and toxicity. Focusing on bacteria, we compare known 41 survival limits in ammonia to estimated ammonia concentrations on Enceladus and 42 Titan. We find that ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Astrobiology, Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life, Reviewer, too: Language, Numeracy, and Musicality

entry.content:

Abstract: ... Our study demonstrates that NHP functions as a prebiotic , reshaping the gut microbiome ... Secondly, NHP modulates the gut-liver axis by acting as a prebiotic . It restores a healthy gut ... functional groups within NHP responsible for its prebiotic ...

entry.title: Infrared Search for Vinyl Cyanide in Cassini/CIRS Polar Winter Observations

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: Z McQueen, C Nixon, K Sung

Journal: 2026

Abstract: Titan's atmosphere is a dense and active chemical reactor forming complex organic and nitrile species relevant to prebiotic chemistry. Molecular nitrogen (N 2) and methane (CH 4) undergo photolysis and subsequently react to form more complex ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Astrobiology, Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life, Reviewer, too: Language, Numeracy, and Musicality

entry.title: Method Development for the Analysis of Carbonaceous Chondrites by Laser Desorption/Ionization and Secondary Ion Time-of-Flight Mass Spectrometry

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: E Rados, J Frank, E Pittenauer - Journal of mass spectrometry: JMS, 2026

Abstract: This study focuses on the development of a laser desorption/ionization mass spectrometric method for analyzing carbonaceous chondrites, meteorites that may hold clues to the origin of life . Since carbonaceous chondrites are only available in ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Astrobiology, Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life, Reviewer, too: Language, Numeracy, and Musicality

entry.content:
Authors: S Chirumbolo, A Vella - Theory in Biosciences, 2026

Abstract: ... : the RNA World remains the lead functional hypothesis because we can: a demonstrate RNA catalysis and heredity in vitro, b sketch plausible prebiotic ... In short, the RNA World looks less like a stand-alone "soup" and more like RNA in a ...

entry.title: Reconstructing ancient protein alphabets: what can we truly infer?

Abstract: ... Early views emphasized prebiotic availability and the expansion of metabolic pathways, but ... However, prebiotic availability is not necessarily synonymous with early genetic encoding. ... Metabolism - first models for the origins of life tend to ...

entry.title: Physicochemical Characterization, Prebiotic Potential, and Lipid-Lowering Effect of Mesembryanthemum crystallinum L. Polysaccharide

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: H Cao, B Yang, Y Wang, J Zhang, H Xiong, H Zhang... - Foods, 2026

Abstract: Excessive lipid accumulation, a hallmark characteristic of high-fat diet (HFD)-induced obesity, has become a worldwide challenge, necessitating the exploration of secure and efficacious natural products for its intervention. In the present work, a ...
